name: Chaussons La Confiture
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200°C.
2. Roll out the puff pastry to about 0.5 cm thick.
3. Cut rounds using a 10 cm diameter cutter or a glass.
4. Place jam on one side of each round.
5. Beat the egg with water, then brush the jam lightly with the egg mixture.
6. Fold the rounds in half and press the edges firmly to seal.
7. Place the pastries on a dampened baking tray, brushing with egg wash, and sprinkle with sugar.
8. Bake in the center of the oven for about 20 minutes.
9. Do not open the oven door during the first quarter hour.
10. Remove from the oven when nicely colored and serve hot or cold.
